title: Ownership, Borrowing, Aliasing, and API Contracts · Memory Trace: Unique Shared Borrowed
summary: A media index passes buffers through parsers, caches, and callbacks where no component knows who must release or may mutate them. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem unique shared borrowed increment in ownership-annotated buffer API. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify each pointer as unique owner, shared owner, mutable borrow, immutable borrow, weak observation, or non-owning handle.
Derive maximum capacity from object limit, element size, metadata, and stakeholder workload before allocation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
